$comment: Voice line script for Hedgemony hoglet/hedgehog/builder units. One source of truth for both the runtime registry and the batch generation script. Each line is a short phrase; intent and unit fields drive when/where it plays. Generate 2-4 takes per line for variety.

voice_direction.tone: Earnest, slightly anxious British radio operator. Think WW2 RAF dispatcher crossed with a small woodland creature. Never bombastic. Never sarcastic.
voice_direction.compression: Light radio-band EQ + subtle bandpass for unit chatter; full range for the hedgehog (orchestrator) and goal-complete fanfare.
voice_direction.loudness: Normalize to -16 LUFS integrated; peak ceiling -2 dBTP. Trim leading/trailing silence to <50ms.

hoglet.voice_hint: Higher pitch, eager, slightly breathless. The grunt unit. Pick ONE consistent voice across all hoglet lines so they read as the same archetype, not different actors.

hedgehog.voice_hint: Calmer, slightly older, measured. The orchestrator. Same actor as hoglet but with deliberate slow delivery — or a different actor entirely if budget allows.

intervention_request: I need your call on this.

builder.voice_hint: Constructive, friendly. Slightly different timbre from hoglet so the operator can tell them apart by ear.

system.voice_hint: Non-character announcer. Used sparingly for major narrative beats. Could be a gentle synthesized pad if voice budget is tight.

elevenlabs.hoglet: voice_id placeholder — pick a young, slightly nasal Brit. e.g. 'Charlotte' or a custom-trained one.
